description: This simple 100% cotton t-shirt is ideal for adding a personal touch to your Mumbles Teddy Bear. Available in a variety of colours to fit all small, medium, large Mumble bears. Sublimation white is 100% polyester and suitable for sublimation printing. Not suitable for children under 36 months. Size S, M, L * Baby Blue, Baby Pink, Bottle and Wine Red are only available in M. Fabric:100% Cotton Sweatshirt. Sublimation suite: 100% polyester.
